overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a muddy trail through rural farmland toward a wooden farmhouse. The scene features overcast foggy weather, wooden fences, grazing cows, and a windmill in the distance, with the character eventually reaching the farmhouse porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy trail through open farmland approaching distant farmhouse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along muddy path toward distant farmhouse with windmill visible on the left

entered.detail: winding dirt path with tire tracks through grass
two-story wooden house with chimney and porch
split-rail wooden fencing lining the path
tall wooden windmill structure with spinning blades
tornado-like dust funnel visible in the distance behind the farmhouse

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy trail through open farmland under overcast skies. A wooden farmhouse sits in the distance with a windmill to the left, while wooden fences line the right side of the path. A dust devil spins in the far background.

events.description: cows become visible in fenced pasture to the right of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the muddy path beside a wooden livestock pen containing grazing cows

notable_agents.action: cows grazing behind split-rail wooden fence in pasture

entered.detail: enclosed pasture area with split-rail fencing containing cattle
several cows grazing in the fenced pasture
rope clothesline with hanging laundry visible near the farmhouse

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a wooden livestock pen comes into view on the right containing grazing cows. The farmhouse grows larger in the center of the frame, and a clothesline with hanging laundry becomes visible. The windmill remains visible on the left, now closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse yard with covered porch entrance

events.description: character steps onto the covered wooden porch of the farmhouse

agents.ego_description: approaching the farmhouse and stepping onto the covered wooden porch

entered.detail: covered wooden porch with steps and support posts
large round metal tub on ground near clothesline

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the farmhouse yard, passing the clothesline with laundry and a metal washtub. The livestock pen and cows fall behind as the character approaches the house. The character steps onto the covered wooden porch, entering the sheltered area at the front of the house.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a muddy rural trail that leads from open farmland toward the sheltered porch of a wooden farmhouse. It begins with the character walking under overcast skies, passing wooden fences while a distant windmill and a spinning dust devil mark the horizon. As the character progresses, the perspective shifts to reveal a livestock pen with grazing cows on the right and a clothesline with hanging laundry appearing before the house. The scene then opens into the farmhouse yard, passing a metal washtub as the livestock pen falls behind. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the open air and step onto the covered wooden porch at the front of the house.
